examples: She heard the priest's familiar, flat footfall on the staircase.
The Rat's light footfall was presently heard approaching over the parched grass.
I always think not so distant future seems a footfall can touch.
Scottish Retail Consortium (SRC) footfall figures show numbers increased by 1% compared to a year ago.
Figures suggest that between 2007 and 2011, average weekly footfall dropped from 46, 380 to 38, 400.
